reviews.review_description: Was great for my littler cousin, until he thought that he could jump into the ocean on the polar bear level and smashed into my table and got hurt.

developer_response.body: We’re really sorry to hear this happened, and we hope your cousin is okay. VR can feel very real—especially for kids—so please make sure the play area is clear, keep a safe distance from furniture, and enable boundary before each session. We’re reviewing the Polar Bear level and will consider adding a clearer in-app safety reminder. Thank you for the feedback—it helps us improve.

reviews.review_description: It's cute for kids. My children liked it very much.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your inspiration. As part of our broader initiative to create virtual school projects, we are developing over 30 apps across subjects like chemistry, physics, math, biology and dinosaur. The app you reviewed is an early result of this ambitious project.
